modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't find a school in Slate system.

full_description_text: User is trying to locate a school in Slate. The school is not appearing in the list. This is causing confusion and delays. Need help to resolve this issue.
short_description: Can't find a school in Slate system.
description: User is trying to locate a school in Slate. The school is not appearing in the list. This is causing confusion and delays. Need help to resolve this issue.
